expectations.text: Confirms company is in-scope for CSRD
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states "The company falls under CSRD"

expectations.text: Correctly identifies all three size thresholds are met (employees, turnover, assets)
expectations.evidence: Lists all three: 800 employees (>250), €120M turnover (>€40M), €55M assets (>€20M)

expectations.text: Identifies company as a PIE listed on EU regulated market
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies Frankfurt Stock Exchange as EU regulated market and PIE status

expectations.text: States first mandatory reporting year as FY 2024 (published 2025) for PIE with >500 employees
expectations.evidence: States "First Reporting Year: FY 2024, published in 2025" as Wave 1

expectations.text: Mentions key obligations: ESRS 2, DMA, assurance, XBRL
expectations.evidence: Lists ESRS 2, DMA, Art. 26a limited assurance, XBRL/iXBRL, management report location
